_notes.electionId: 898 = PRIMARY 2026 (08/04/2026). Confirmed from the election dropdown on https://voter.votewa.gov/CandidateList.aspx and by candidate.ashx?e=898&r=177131&la=&c=03 returning ElectionID 898 candidates. NOTE: 899 is the GENERAL 2026 (11/03/2026) election, which the CandidateList page redirects to by default.
_notes.raceIds: Deduplicated union of every non-PCO contest on the Aug 4 2026 primary candidate lists for Benton (c=03) and Franklin (c=11). Includes statewide judicial (Supreme Court, Court of Appeals) and LD 14/15 races that only clip the counties; prune to the guide's actual scope before import. Precinct Committee Officer races were excluded.
_notes.candidateStatements: candidate.ashx already returns candidate rosters for e=898 race IDs, but CandidateStatementText is still empty and IsApprovedForPost=False as of 2026-07-04. Pamphlet statements/photos typically publish about 2-3 weeks before the election (mid-July); re-run import:pamphlet then.
_notes.pdc: kv7h-kjye covers 2026 (rolling all-years dataset). As of 2026-07-04: 22 distinct candidate filers with contribution records for Benton/Franklin/LD8/LD16 (964 Benton+Franklin contribution rows). Nikki Torres has two 2026 filer_ids: TORRN--301 (LD16 Senate, old) and TORRN3-301 (LD8 Senate, current race).
